title: Third Impact Infinite Possibilities
wikitext:
[]: Third Impact: Infinite Possibilities?             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sat Jan 16, 2010 12:13 am recently i have read a description of a A/S fan-fic that has had me thinking. (bear with me, this isn't a shipping thread of any sort.) it was called "30 kisses, 30 ways". the basis is that when 3I happened it made all of these alternate realitys with one thing in common, in each one Shinji and Asuka kiss. now anyway, to the point, this made me think, if 3I made all of these alternate strings of reality as this writer has confronted us with, what would it be like. would there be a limit, or would it be endless? would other offsprings of the series count as examples of this alternate universe? lets discuss simply, the possibilitys, and the theorys, including any possible theoretical data that would back this up. so this thread dosn't get sent to the fandom forum, i would like to politely request you stay on topic, and if you have a desire to read this fan-fic, i would encourage you to find it yourself. thank you. and to clarify AuraTwilight wrote: Instrumentality didn't create any alternate realities. It's not a Reality Warping Lotus Eater Machine, it's a spiritual orgy-buttsex-o-matron.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jan 16, 2010 12:30 am Instrumentality didn't create any alternate realities. It's not a Reality Warping Lotus Eater Machine, it's a spiritual orgy-buttsex-o-matron.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Jan 16, 2010 12:35 am The only way to trigger 3I is with an S2 and a being powerful enough to deliver a world-covering Anti ATF so there are certainly only a few ways it could come about. Also: AuraTwilight wrote: Instrumentality didn't create any alternate realities. It's not a Reality Warping Lotus Eater Machine, it's a spiritual orgy-buttsex-o-matron.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sat Jan 16, 2010 12:38 am AuraTwilight wrote: Instrumentality didn't create any alternate realities. It's not a Reality Warping Lotus Eater Machine, it's a spiritual orgy-buttsex-o-matron.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sat Jan 16, 2010 12:43 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: The only way to trigger 3I is with an S2 and a being powerful enough to deliver a world-covering Anti ATF so there are certainly only a few ways it could come about.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jan 16, 2010 1:21 am okay yojimbo, lets take this farther, lets say the energies created during this anti-ATField formation were somehow strong enough to not only neutralize all ATFields, but also rip a hole in the fabric of time and space creating these differnt realitys,

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sat Jan 16, 2010 1:35 am You really need a spell checker mate. Also, I agree with the others. There are no alternative realities, just lots of minds being squished together with interesting outcomes.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Jan 16, 2010 1:50 am shinjidoggysasuka wrote: lets say the energies created during this anti-ATField formation were somehow strong enough to not only neutralize all ATFields, but also rip a hole in the fabric of time and space creating these differnt realitys, how might they turn out?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jan 16, 2010 2:13 am Uh, that line of different universes being created is something Eric borrowed from Re-Take (a doujinshi, and a famous one for a fan-comic at that) for his 30 Kisses fanfic (a fanwork of his own). Fanworks have no bearing on series canon. Though I can't wait to see Eric's reaction to this thread. IF AUs were created, I suppose one AU could be the EoE live-action sequence, another like the scrapped EoE one, and another like the 26AU. But who really knows.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sat Jan 16, 2010 7:11 am AuraTwilight wrote: okay yojimbo, lets take this farther, lets say the energies created during this anti-ATField formation were somehow strong enough to not only neutralize all ATFields, but also rip a hole in the fabric of time and space creating these differnt realitys,

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 16, 2010 7:55 am shinjidoggysasuka wrote: do other offsprings of the series count as examples of this alternate universe?

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sat Jan 16, 2010 7:59 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: shinjidoggysasuka wrote: do other offsprings of the series count as examples of this alternate universe?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 16, 2010 8:04 am shinjidoggysasuka wrote: you forgot the Shinji ikari rasing project.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sat Jan 16, 2010 8:11 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: shinjidoggysasuka wrote: you forgot the Shinji ikari rasing project.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 16, 2010 8:24 am shinjidoggysasuka wrote: isn't there one in Japan that has him going to some super exclusive catholic school?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jan 16, 2010 8:47 am In one sense, every fic that deals with (post-)3I is another strand in the skein of possibilities -- be it the hastily brushed under the carpet localized anomaly of Shanejayell's Third Genesis through to the castaways in an empty world of Orchestrating the Silence , just to take fics that presume canon over episodes 1-24. In the broader context, taking a many worlds view, each moment is the basis for a fanning out of potential futures; 3I brings enough forces into play to provide the potential for a much broader fan then normal, even if a wide swathe of those possibilities are essentially uninteresting, being different and potentially Dali-esque variants on a barren and deserted world.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sat Jan 16, 2010 10:56 am Mr. Tines wrote: In one sense, every fic that deals with (post-)3I is another strand in the skein of possibilities -- be it the hastily brushed under the carpet localized anomaly of Shanejayell's Third Genesis through to the castaways in an empty world of Orchestrating the Silence , just to take fics that presume canon over episodes 1-24. In the broader context, taking a many worlds view, each moment is the basis for a fanning out of potential futures; 3I brings enough forces into play to provide the potential for a much broader fan then normal, even if a wide swathe of those possibilities are essentially uninteresting, being different and potentially Dali-esque variants on a barren and deserted world.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jan 16, 2010 1:07 pm but the ATField is a manifestation of energy created from an ego, and on the premisis that its energy, that could be grounds for the concentration causing said rip.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Jan 16, 2010 1:40 pm AuraTwilight wrote: It's a manifestation of a barrier between one ego and the rest of the world. It's not necessarily "energy" that can be "used" for what you're proposing, not to mention energy DOES NOT WORK THAT WAY /MORBO VOICE.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Jan 16, 2010 1:52 pm You want this to happen, read ReTake of Evangelion.
